name: Sato Takeru
homeTitle: Principal Technical Support Engineer & Full-Stack Architect
homeDesc: 16+ years building, scaling, and supporting production systems across AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, and modern LLM infrastructure.
aboutDesc1: Principal Technical Support Engineer at Salesforce, previously at AWS and Rakuten. I design, scale, and support production systems across cloud platforms, distributed services, and AI/LLM infrastructure.
aboutDesc2: Engineered a HIPAA-compliant telehealth platform serving 5,000+ concurrent users; delivered a RAG-based enterprise search system that accelerated retrieval accuracy by 70%; established an event-driven AI agent that reduced manual workflow execution by 80%.
aboutDesc3: Recognized for translating complex technical problems into clear customer outcomes and mentoring engineers to ship production code within their first month.
